theme_and_archetype.vibe: Brutalist clarity, editorial magazine meets data terminal. Information-first layout.

rules: Headings use Cabinet Grotesk with tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Overlines, data labels, ticker text, and numbers MUST use IBM Plex Mono, uppercase, with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Never use Inter or generic sans. Use Black/Bold for impact or Light for elegance.
Color is function. 95% of UI is monochrome.
Red is used for 'trending up', 'hot', alerts, or primary CTA.
Blue is used for links or secondary game actions.

layout_and_spacing.showcase_grid: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric, massive typography, col-span-full for hero items. gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. Strict modular blocks, gap-0 with border-collapse, or gap-4 with sharp borders.
rules: Expose the skeleton. The grid lines should be visible (1px borders).
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

surfaces_and_components.general: Neo-Brutalist/Swiss layout. Sharp edges (rounded-none), no soft shadows.
surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid background. 1px solid border. For hover states, use a hard shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]) and -translate-y-1.
surfaces_and_components.header: Solid background with a hard bottom border. DO NOT use transparent headers. Sticky z-50.
surfaces_and_components.marquee: The 'Editorial Ribbon'. Monospaced font, pale background, border top and bottom, very slow drift.
surfaces_and_components.charts: Shadcn charts/Recharts. Monospaced axis labels. High contrast bars (e.g., all black with one accent red bar).
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Sharp rectangles. Inverted contrast on hover.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract white sphere/globe, useful as a subtle hero background or graphic element.

trending_person.description: Taylor Swift concert stadium shot for trending people/entertainment category.

trending_tech.description: Detailed shot of Apple iPhone for trending tech or affiliate product card.

trending_place.description: Tokyo city street neon evening for trending places/travel category.

sponsor_logo_ad.description: Nike logo on dark background, use as a sponsored trend card/ad slot placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing on a hybrid 'Editorial Magazine meets Data Terminal'.
Implement the 'Trending Now' ticker using react-fast-marquee as an Editorial Ribbon with IBM Plex Mono.
For the Dashboard, use strict grids (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) with 1px border dividers to mimic a control room.
For the Game Module ('Higher/Lower'), use a split screen layout with massive typography for the options, and distinct hover states (hard shadows).
Integrate Shadcn UI components for dropdowns/selects (country/category filters) but override styles to remove border-radius (rounded-none).
Monetization spots (newsletter, affiliate cards) should be styled consistently with the brutalist/editorial theme, looking like native data modules.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
